commands.review_summary:
The PR adds safe record/array projection helpers and applies them to provider catalog, model-row, paired-provider, and provider-auth metadata paths with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +127, Tests +159. Total +286 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main uses direct object/array/property projection on provider catalog and auth rows, and the branch's throwing-getter tests demonstrate the failure path without live credentials. I did not execute the tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer acceptance of compatibility/auth-provider semantics, not a narrow repair that automation should choose.

target.title: fix(plugin-sdk): isolate provider catalog projection failures
target.body:
## Summary

- isolates provider catalog projection failures so unreadable provider, model, or auth rows do not drop healthy sibling entries
- adds shared safe record/array boundary helpers for plugin-owned provider metadata
- keeps the change scoped to provider catalog/auth/model projection paths and their focused regressions
- uses only synthetic provider/plugin fixtures in tests and PR notes

## Verification

- replayed the narrow provider-catalog slice onto current `origin/main` 26913e60a42e after the old PR branch became conflicting
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/plugin-sdk/provider-entry.test.ts src/plugins/provider-catalog.test.ts --reporter=verbose`: 1 unit-fast shard, 14 tests passed on head bcd51a443a85
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/plugin-sdk/provider-entry.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-entry.ts src/plugins/provider-catalog-unified-text.ts src/plugins/provider-catalog.test.ts src/plugins/provider-catalog.ts src/shared/safe-record.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/plugin-sdk/provider-entry.ts src/plugin-sdk/provider-entry.test.ts src/plugins/provider-catalog.ts src/plugins/provider-catalog.test.ts src/plugins/provider-catalog-unified-text.ts src/shared/safe-record.ts`
- `git diff --check` plus touched-file scrub for reported fixture names and private local paths: clean
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: malformed provider catalog/auth/model metadata no longer crashes provider catalog projection or hides healthy sibling provider entries.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw `gwt` worktree on current `origin/main` 26913e60a42e with focused provider-entry/provider-catalog tests on head bcd51a443a85.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: replayed the narrow provider-catalog slice onto current main, resolved current import-boundary conflicts, ran focused provider-entry/provider-catalog tests, formatter check, targeted lint check, diff check, touched-file scrub, and autoreview.

Evidence after fix: tests prove unreadable provider catalog entries, catalog model rows, paired provider rows, and auth option rows are skipped while healthy sibling entries remain available.

Observed result after fix: one malformed plugin-owned provider metadata row no longer poisons the whole provider catalog surface.

What was not tested: no full live provider setup flow and no separate local Testbox run beyond GitHub PR checks. GitHub PR checks on `bcd51a443a85` were successful after the PR-body refresh. Behavior is covered by provider SDK/catalog unit tests.
target.author: vincentkoc
